G2160.definition: from a compound of εὖ and a derivative of the base of τροπή (meaning well-turned, i.e. ready at repartee, jocose).
G2160.kjv: witticism, i.e. (in a vulgar sense) ribaldry:--jesting.

G2161.definition: from εὖ and a derivative of τυγχάνω; well- fated, i.e. fortunate.

G2163.kjv: well spoken of, i.e. reputable:--of good report.

G2164.kjv: to bear well, i.e. be fertile:--bring forth abundantly.

G2165.kjv: to put (middle voice or passively, be) in a good frame of mind, i.e. rejoice:--fare, make glad, be (make) merry, rejoice.

G2168.definition: from εὐχάριστος; to be grateful, i.e. (actively) to express gratitude (towards).
G2168.kjv: specially, to say grace at a meal:--(give) thank(-ful, -s).

G2169.kjv: actively, grateful language (to God, as an act of worship):--thankfulness, (giving of) thanks(-giving).

G2170.definition: from εὖ and a derivative of χαρίζομαι.

G2171.kjv: properly, a wish, expressed as a petition to God, or in votive obligation:--prayer, vow.

G2172.definition: middle voice of a primary verb; to wish.
G2172.kjv: by implication, to pray to God:--pray, will, wish.

G2173.kjv: easily used, i.e. useful:--profitable, meet for use.

G2174.definition: from a compound of εὖ and ψυχή.
G2174.kjv: to be in good spirits, i.e. feel encouraged:--be of good comfort.

G2175.definition: from a compound of εὖ and a derivative of ὄζω.

G2176.definition: from εὖ and ὄνομα; properly, well-named (good-omened), i.e. the left (which was the lucky side among the pagan Greeks).
G2176.kjv: neuter as adverbial, at the left hand:--(on the) left.

G2179.kjv: Ephesine, or situated at Ephesus:--of Ephesus.

G2180.kjv: an Ephesian or inhabitant of Ephesus:--Ephesian, of Ephesus.

G2181.kjv: Ephesus, a city of Asia Minor:--Ephesus.

G2182.definition: from a compound of ἐπί and εὑρίσκω.

G2183.kjv: diurnality, i.e. (specially) the quotidian rotation or class of the Jewish priests' service at the Temple, as distributed by families:--course.

G2185.definition: from ἐπί and a cognate of ἥκω.
G2185.kjv: to arrive upon, i.e. extend to:--reach.

G2186.definition: from ἐπί and ἵστημι; to stand upon, i.e. be present (in various applications, friendly or otherwise, usually literal).
G2186.kjv: --assault, come (in, to, unto, upon), be at hand (instant), present, stand (before, by, over).

G2187.definition: of Hebrew origin (אֶפְרַיִם or better עֶפְרוֹן).

G2189.kjv: by implication, a reason for opposition:--enmity, hatred.

G2190.definition: from a primary  (to hate); hateful (passively, odious, or actively, hostile).
G2190.kjv: usually as a noun, an adversary (especially Satan):--enemy, foe.

G2191.kjv: an adder or other poisonous snake (literally or figuratively):--viper.

G2192.definition: a primary verb; to hold (used in very various applications, literally or figuratively, direct or remote; such as possession.
G2192.kjv: ability, contiuity, relation, or condition):--be (able, X hold, possessed with), accompany, + begin to amend, can(+ -not), X conceive, count, diseased, do + eat, + enjoy, + fear, following, have, hold, keep, + lack, + go to law, lie, + must needs, + of necessity, + need, next, + recover, + reign, + rest, + return, X sick, take for, + tremble, + uncircumcised, use.

G2193.kjv: a conjunction, preposition and adverb of continuance, until (of time and place):--even (until, unto), (as) far (as), how long, (un-)til(-l), (hither-, un-, up) to, while(-s).

G2194.kjv: Zabulon (i.e. Zebulon), a region of Palestine:--Zabulon.

G2197.kjv: Zacharias (i.e. Zechariah), the name of two Israelites:--Zacharias.

G2201.kjv: a couple, i.e. a team (of oxen yoked together) or brace (of birds tied together):--yoke, pair.

G2202.definition: feminine of a derivative (at the second stage) from the same as ζυγός.

G2203.definition: of uncertain affinity; in the oblique cases there is used instead of it a (probably cognate) name        , which is otherwise obsolete.
G2203.kjv: Zeus or Dis (among the Latins, Jupiter or Jove), the supreme deity of the Greeks:--Jupiter.

G2204.definition: a primary verb; to be hot (boil, of liquids.
G2204.kjv: or glow, of solids), i.e. (figuratively) be fervid (earnest):--be fervent.

G2205.definition: from ζέω; properly, heat, i.e. (figuratively) "zeal" (in a favorable sense, ardor.
G2205.kjv: in an unfavorable one, jealousy, as of a husband (figuratively, of God), or an enemy, malice):--emulation, envy(-ing), fervent mind, indignation, jealousy, zeal.

G2206.kjv: to have warmth of feeling for or against:--affect, covet (earnestly), (have) desire, (move with) envy, be jealous over, (be) zealous(-ly affect).

G2208.kjv: a Zealot, i.e. (specially) partisan for Jewish political independence:--Zelotes.

G2209.definition: probably akin to the base of δαμάζω (through the idea of violence).

G2210.kjv: to injure, i.e. (reflexively or passively) to experience detriment:--be cast away, receive damage, lose, suffer loss.

G2211.definition: probably contracted from a poetic form of Ζεύς and δῶρον; Jove-given.

G2212.definition: of uncertain affinity; to seek (literally or figuratively).
G2212.kjv: specially, (by Hebraism) to worship (God), or (in a bad sense) to plot (against life):--be (go) about, desire, endeavour, enquire (for), require, (X will) seek (after, for, means). Compare πυνθάνομαι.

G2213.kjv: a search (properly concretely), i.e. (in words) a debate:--question.

G2214.kjv: a searching (properly, the act), i.e. a dispute or its theme:--question.

G2217.definition: akin to the base of νέφος.
G2217.kjv: gloom (as shrouding like a cloud):--blackness, darkness, mist.

G2218.definition: from the root of  (to join, especially by a "yoke"); a coupling, i.e. (figuratively) servitude (a law or obligation).
G2218.kjv: also (literally) the beam of the balance (as connecting the scales):--pair of balances, yoke.

G2221.definition: from the same as ζῶον and ἀγρεύω.
G2221.kjv: to take alive (make a prisoner of war), i.e. (figuratively) to capture or ensnare:--take captive, catch.

G2223.definition: probably akin to the base of ζυγός; a belt.

G2224.kjv: to bind about (especially with a belt):--gird.

G2225.definition: from the same as ζῶον and a derivative of γίνομαι.
G2225.kjv: to engender alive, i.e. (by analogy) to rescue (passively, be saved) from death:--live, preserve.

G2226.definition: neuter of a derivative of ζάω.
G2226.kjv: a live thing, i.e. an animal:--beast.

G2227.definition: from the same as ζῶον and ποιέω.
G2227.kjv: to (re-)vitalize (literally or figuratively):--make alive, give life, quicken.

G2228.definition: a primary particle of distinction between two connected terms; disjunctive, or.
G2228.kjv: comparative, than:--and, but (either), (n-)either, except it be, (n-)or (else), rather, save, than, that, what, yea. Often used in connection with other particles. Compare especially ἤδη, ἤπερ, ἤτοι.

G2229.definition: an adverb of confirmation; perhaps intensive of ἤ; used only (in the New Testament) before μέν.

G2232.kjv: a leader, i.e. chief person (or figuratively, place) of a province:--governor, prince, ruler.

G2233.definition: middle voice of a (presumed) strengthened form of ἄγω; to lead, i.e. command (with official authority).
G2233.kjv: figuratively, to deem, i.e. consider:--account, (be) chief, count, esteem, governor, judge, have the rule over, suppose, think.

G2234.definition: adverb from a derivative of the base of ἡδονή.

G2235.definition: apparently from ἤ (or possibly ἦ) and δή.
G2235.kjv: even now:--already, (even) now (already), by this time.

G2236.definition: neuter plural of the superlative of the same as ἡδέως.

G2238.definition: neuter of the compound of the same as ἡδέως and ὀσμή.

G2240.kjv: to arrive, i.e. be present (literally or figuratively):--come.

G2241.definition: of Hebrew origin (אֵל with pronominal suffix).

G2245.definition: from  (a comrade, i.e. one of the same age).
G2245.kjv: as big as, i.e. (interjectively) how much:--how (what) great.

G2246.definition: from  (a ray; perhaps akin to the alternate of αἱρέομαι); the sun.

G2250.definition: feminine (with ὥρα implied) of a derivative of  (to sit; akin to the base of ἑδραῖος) meaning tame, i.e. gentle; day, i.e. (literally) the time space between dawn and dark, or the whole 24 hours (but several days were usually reckoned by the Jews as inclusive of the parts of both extremes).
G2250.kjv: figuratively, a period (always defined more or less clearly by the context):--age, + alway, (mid-)day (by day, (-ly)), + for ever, judgment, (day) time, while, years.

G2253.definition: from a presumed compound of the base of ἥμισυ and θνήσκω.
G2253.kjv: half dead, i.e. entirely exhausted:--half dead.

G2254.kjv: to (or for, with, by) us:--our, (for) us, we.

G2255.definition: neuter of a derivative from an inseparable prefix akin to ἅμα (through the idea of partition involved in connection) and meaning semi-.

G2256.definition: from the base of ἥμισυ and ὥρα.

G2258.kjv: I (thou, etc.) was (wast or were):--+ agree, be, X have (+ charge of), hold, use, was(-t), were.

G2260.kjv: than at all (or than perhaps, than indeed):--than.

G2261.kjv: properly, affable, i.e. mild or kind:--gentle.

G2263.definition: perhaps by transposition from ἔρημος (through the idea of stillness).

G2264.kjv: Herod, the name of four Jewish kings:--Herod.

G2265.definition: plural of a derivative of Ἡρώδης.

G2266.kjv: Herodias, a woman of the Heodian family:--Herodias.

G2270.kjv: to keep still (intransitively), i.e. refrain from labor, meddlesomeness or speech:--cease, hold peace, be quiet, rest.

G2271.kjv: (as noun) stillness, i.e. desistance from bustle or language:--quietness, silence.

G2272.definition: a prolonged form of a compound probably of a derivative of the base of ἑδραῖος and perhaps ἔχω.
G2272.kjv: properly, keeping one's seat (sedentary), i.e. (by implication) still (undisturbed, undisturbing):--peaceable, quiet.

G2274.definition: from the same as ἥττον; to make worse, i.e. vanquish (literally or figuratively).
G2274.kjv: by implication, to rate lower:--be inferior, overcome.

G2275.kjv: a deterioration, i.e. (objectively) failure or (subjectively) loss:--diminishing, fault.

G2276.definition: neuter of comparative of  (slightly) used for that of κακός; worse (as noun).

G2277.definition: third person singular imperative of εἰμί.

G2278.kjv: to make a loud noise, i.e. reverberate:--roar, sound.

G2279.definition: of uncertain affinity; a loud or confused noise ("echo"), i.e. roar.

G2284.kjv: to stupefy (with surprise), i.e. astound:--amaze, astonish.

G2285.kjv: stupefaction (by surprise), i.e. astonishment:--X amazed, + astonished, wonder.

G2287.definition: from (the feminine form of) θάνατος and φέρω.

G2288.kjv: (properly, an adjective used as a noun) death (literally or figuratively):--X deadly, (be…) death.

G2289.definition: from θάνατος to kill (literally or figuratively):--become dead, (cause to be) put to death, kill, mortify.

G2290.kjv: to celebrate funeral rites, i.e. inter:--bury.

G2291.kjv: Thara (i.e. Terach), the father of Abraham:--Thara.

G2292.kjv: to exercise courage:--be bold, X boldly, have confidence, be confident. Compare τολμάω.

G2293.kjv: to have courage:--be of good cheer (comfort). Compare θαῤῥέω.

G2295.definition: apparently from a form of θεάομαι; wonder (properly concrete.

G2296.kjv: by implication, to admire:--admire, have in admiration, marvel, wonder.

G2297.kjv: wondrous, i.e. (neuter as noun) a miracle:--wonderful thing.

G2300.definition: a prolonged form of a primary verb; to look closely at, i.e. (by implication) perceive (literally or figuratively).
G2300.kjv: by extension to visit:--behold, look (upon), see. Compare ὀπτάνομαι.

G2301.kjv: to expose as a spectacle:--make a gazing stock.

G2302.definition: from θεάομαι; a place for public show ("theatre"), i.e. general audience-room.
G2302.kjv: by implication, a show itself (figuratively):--spectacle, theatre.

G2303.definition: probably neuter of θεῖος (in its original sense of flashing).

G2304.kjv: godlike (neuter as noun, divinity):-- divine, godhead.

G2307.definition: from the prolonged form of θέλω; a determination (properly, the thing), i.e. (actively) choice (specially, purpose, decree.
G2307.kjv: abstractly, volition) or (passively) inclination:-- desire, pleasure, will.

G2309.definition: apparently strengthened from the alternate form of αἱρέομαι; to determine (as an active option from subjective impulse; whereas βούλομαι properly denotes rather a passive acquiescence in objective considerations), i.e. choose or prefer (literally or figuratively); by implication, to wish, i.e. be inclined to (sometimes adverbially, gladly); impersonally for the future tense, to be about to.
G2309.kjv: by Hebraism, to delight in:--desire, be disposed (forward), intend, list, love, mean, please, have rather, (be) will (have, -ling, - ling(-ly)).

G2310.kjv: something put down, i.e. a substruction (of a building, etc.), (literally or figuratively):--foundation.

G2311.kjv: to lay a basis for, i.e. (literally) erect, or (figuratively) consolidate:--(lay the) found(- ation), ground, settle.

G2314.kjv: an opponent of deity:--to fight against God.

G2315.definition: from θεός and a presumed derivative of πνέω.
G2315.kjv: divinely breathed in:--given by inspiration of God.

G2316.definition: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with ὁ) the supreme Divinity; figuratively, a magistrate.
G2316.kjv: by Hebraism, very:--X exceeding, God, god(-ly, -ward).

G2318.kjv: reverent of God, i.e. pious:--worshipper of God.

G2319.definition: from θεός and the base of στυγνητός.
G2319.kjv: hateful to God, i.e. impious:--hater of God.

G2321.definition: from θεός and φίλος; friend of God.

G2322.definition: from θεραπεύω; attendance (specially, medical, i.e. cure).

G2323.kjv: to wait upon menially, i.e. (figuratively) to adore (God), or (specially) to relieve (of disease):--cure, heal, worship.

G2324.definition: apparently a participle from an otherwise obsolete derivative of the base of θέρος.

G2325.definition: from θέρος (in the sense of the crop).

G2331.kjv: a Thessalonican, i.e. inhabitant of Thessalonice:--Thessalonian.

G2332.kjv: Thessalonice, a place in Asia Minor:--Thessalonica.

G2334.definition: from a derivative of θεάομαι (perhaps by addition of ὁράω).
G2334.kjv: to be a spectator of, i.e. discern, (literally, figuratively (experience) or intensively (acknowledge)):--behold, consider, look on, perceive, see. Compare ὀπτάνομαι.

G2337.kjv: to suckle, (by implication) to suck:--(give) suck(-ling).

G2340.kjv: to hunt (an animal), i.e. (figuratively) to carp at:--catch.

G2341.definition: from a compound of θηρίον and μάχομαι.
G2341.kjv: to be a beast-fighter (in the gladiatorial show), i.e. (figuratively) to encounter (furious men):--fight with wild beasts.

G2342.definition: diminutive from the same as θήρα.

G2343.kjv: to amass or reserve (literally or figuratively):--lay up (treasure), (keep) in store, (heap) treasure (together, up).

G2344.kjv: a deposit, i.e. wealth (literally or figuratively):--treasure.

G2345.definition: a prolonged form of an obsolete primary  (to finger); to manipulate, i.e. have to do with.

G2346.definition: akin to the base of τρίβος.
G2346.kjv: to crowd (literally or figuratively):--afflict, narrow, throng, suffer tribulation, trouble.

G2347.kjv: pressure (literally or figuratively):--afflicted(-tion), anguish, burdened, persecution, tribulation, trouble.

G2348.definition: a strengthened form of a simpler primary   (which is used for it only in certain tenses).
G2348.kjv: to die (literally or figuratively):--be dead, die.

G2350.kjv: to be in tumult, i.e. disturb, clamor:--make ado (a noise), trouble self, set on an uproar.

G2357.definition: probably from the base of θροέω.
G2357.kjv: ceremonious in worship (as demonstrative), i.e. pious:--religious.

G2358.definition: from a prolonged compound of the base of θροέω; and a derivative of ἅπτομαι (meaning a noisy iambus, sung in honor of Bacchus).
G2358.kjv: to make an acclamatory procession, i.e. (figuratively) to conquer or (by Hebraism) to give victory:--(cause) to triumph (over).

G2359.definition: genitive case , etc.; of uncertain derivation.

G2360.kjv: to clamor, i.e. (by implication) to frighten:--trouble.

G2361.definition: perhaps from τρέφω (in the sense of thickening).

G2362.kjv: by implication, power or (concretely) a potentate:--seat, throne.

G2363.kjv: Thyatira, a place in Asia Minor:--Thyatira.

G2364.kjv: a female child, or (by Hebraism) descendant (or inhabitant):--daughter.

G2366.definition: from θύω (in the sense of blowing) a storm:--tempest.

G2367.definition: from a derivative of θύω (in the sense of blowing; denoting a certain fragrant tree).

G2368.definition: from θυμιάω; an aroma, i.e. fragrant powder burnt in religious service.
G2368.kjv: by implication, the burning itself:--incense, odour.

G2369.kjv: a place of fumigation, i.e. the alter of incense (in the Temple):--censer.

G2370.definition: from a derivative of θύω (in the sense of smoking).
G2370.kjv: to fumigate, i.e. offer aromatic fumes:--burn incense.

G2371.definition: from a presumed compound of θυμός and μάχομαι.
G2371.kjv: to be in a furious fight, i.e. (figuratively) to be exasperated:--be highly displeased.

G2372.kjv: passion (as if breathing hard):--fierceness, indignation, wrath. Compare ψυχή.

G2373.kjv: to put in a passion, i.e. enrage:--be wroth.

G2374.kjv: a portal or entrance (the opening or the closure, literally or figuratively):--door, gate.

G2377.kjv: a gate- warden:--that kept the door, porter.

G2378.kjv: sacrifice (the act or the victim, literally or figuratively):--sacrifice.

G2379.kjv: a place of sacrifice, i.e. an altar (special or genitive case, literal or figurative):--altar.

G2380.definition: a primary verb; properly, to rush (breathe hard, blow, smoke), i.e. (by implication) to sacrifice (properly, by fire, but genitive case).
G2380.kjv: by extension to immolate (slaughter for any purpose):--kill, (do) sacrifice, slay.

G2381.definition: of Chaldee origin (compare תָּאוֹם); the twin.

G2382.kjv: the chest ("thorax"), i.e. (by implication) a corslet:--breast-plate.

G2384.kjv: Jacob (i.e. Ja`akob), the progenitor of the Israelites:--also an Israelite:--Jacob.

G2385.kjv: Jacobus, the name of three Israelites:--James.

G2390.definition: middle voice of apparently a primary verb.
G2390.kjv: to cure (literally or figuratively):--heal, make whole.

G2394.definition: future active participle masculine of ἰάομαι; about to cure.

G2396.definition: second person singular imperative active of εἴδω; used as an interjection to denote surprise.

G2398.definition: of uncertain affinity; pertaining to self, i.e. one's own.
G2398.kjv: by implication, private or separate:--X his acquaintance, when they were alone, apart, aside, due, his (own, proper, several), home, (her, our, thine, your) own (business), private(-ly), proper, severally, their (own).

G2399.kjv: a private person, i.e. (by implication) an ignoramus (compare "idiot"):--ignorant, rude, unlearned.

G2400.definition: second person singular imperative middle voice of εἴδω; used as imperative lo!.

G2401.kjv: Idumæa (i.e. Edom), a region East (and South) of Palestine:--Idumæa.

G2402.definition: a strengthened form of a primary idos (sweat).

G2403.kjv: Jezabel (i.e. Jezebel), a Tyrian woman (used as a synonym of a termagant or false teacher):--Jezabel.

G2404.definition: from ἱερός and πόλις; holy city.
G2404.kjv: Hierapolis, a place in Asia Minor:--Hierapolis.

G2405.kjv: priestliness, i.e. the sacerdotal function:--office of the priesthood, priest's office.

G2406.kjv: the priestly fraternity, i.e. sacerdotal order (figuratively):--priesthood.

G2407.kjv: to be a priest, i.e. perform his functions:--execute the priest's office.

G2411.kjv: a sacred place, i.e. the entire precincts (whereas ναός denotes the central sanctuary itself) of the Temple (at Jerusalem or elsewhere):--temple.

G2412.definition: from ἱερός and the same as πρέπω.

G2414.kjv: Hierosolyma (i.e. Jerushalaim), the capitol of Palestine:--Jerusalem. Compare Ἱερουσαλήμ.

G2415.kjv: a Hierosolymite, i.e. inhabitant of Hierosolyma:--of Jerusalem.

G2418.definition: from a compound of ἱερόν and the base of ἔργον.
G2418.kjv: to be a temple-worker, i.e. officiate as a priest (figuratively):--minister.

G2419.kjv: Hierusalem (i.e. Jerushalem), the capitol of Palestine:--Jerusalem. Compare Ἱεροσόλυμα.

G2420.kjv: sacredness, i.e. (by implication) the priestly office:--priesthood.

G2424.kjv: Jesus (i.e. Jehoshua), the name of our Lord and two (three) other Israelites:--Jesus.

G2425.definition: from  ( or , akin to ἥκω) (to arrive).
G2425.kjv: competent (as if coming in season), i.e. ample (in amount) or fit (in character):--able, + content, enough, good, great, large, long (while), many, meet, much, security, sore, sufficient, worthy.

G2428.definition: from a derivative of the base of ἱκανός (through the idea of approaching for a favor).

G2430.kjv: Iconium, a place in Asia Minor:--Iconium.

G2431.kjv: propitious or merry ("hilarious"), i.e. prompt or willing:--cheerful.

G2433.definition: middle voice from the same as ἵλεως.

G2435.kjv: an expiatory (place or thing), i.e. (concretely) an atoning victim, or (specially) the lid of the Ark (in the Temple):--mercyseat, propitiation.

G2436.definition: perhaps from the alternate form of αἱρέομαι; cheerful (as attractive), i.e. propitious.
G2436.kjv: adverbially (by Hebraism) God be gracious!, i.e. (in averting some calamity) far be it:--be it far, merciful.

G2437.definition: neuter of an adjective from a name of uncertain derivation.
G2437.kjv: (the) Illyrican (shore), i.e. (as a name itself) Illyricum, a region of Europe:--Illyricum.

G2438.definition: perhaps from the same as ἅμα.
G2438.kjv: a strap, i.e. (specially) the tie (of a sandal) or the lash (of a scourge):--latchet, thong.

G2440.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of ennumi (to put on).
G2440.kjv: a dress (inner or outer):--apparel, cloke, clothes, garment, raiment, robe, vesture.

G2442.definition: middle voice from  (a yearning; of uncertain affinity).

G2443.definition: probably from the same as the former part of ἑαυτοῦ (through the demonstrative idea; compare ὁ).
G2443.kjv: in order that (denoting the purpose or the result):--albeit, because, to the intent (that), lest, so as, (so) that, (for) to. Compare ἵνα μή.

G2444.kjv: for what reason ?, i.e. why?:--wherefore, why.

G2445.kjv: Joppe (i.e. Japho), a place in Palestine:--Joppa.

G2446.kjv: the Jordanes (i.e. Jarden), a river of Palestine:--Jordan.

G2447.definition: perhaps from  (to go) or  (to send); rust (as if emitted by metals).
G2447.kjv: also venom (as emitted by serpents):--poison, rust.

G2448.definition: of Hebrew origin (יְהוּדָה or perhaps יֻטָּה).
G2448.kjv: Judah (i.e. Jehudah or Juttah), a part of (or place in) Palestine:--Judah.

G2449.kjv: the Judæan land (i.e. Judæa), a region of Palestine:--Judæa.

G2450.kjv: to become a Judæan, i.e. "Judaize":--live as the Jews.

G3551.kjv: also of the Gospel), or figuratively (a principle):--law.

G3552.kjv: to be sick, i.e. (by implication, of a diseased appetite) to hanker after (figuratively, to harp upon):--dote.

G3564.definition: probably contracted for a compound of νύμφη and δῶρον; nymph-given (i.e. -born).

G3700.kjv: and σκοπέω a watching from a distance):--appear, look, see, shew self.

G3777.kjv: by analogy, not even:--neither, none, nor (yet), (no, yet) not, nothing.

G3778.definition: from the article ὁ and αὐτός.
G3778.kjv: the he (she or it), i.e. this or that (often with article repeated):--he (it was that), hereof, it, she, such as, the same, these, they, this (man, same, woman), which, who.

G3779.kjv: in this way (referring to what precedes or follows):--after that, after (in) this manner, as, even (so), for all that, like(-wise), no more, on this fashion(-wise), so (in like manner), thus, what.

G3781.definition: from ὀφείλω; an ower, i.e. person indebted; figuratively, a delinquent.
G3781.kjv: morally, a transgressor (against God):--debtor, which owed, sinner.

G3782.definition: from ὀφείλω; indebtedness, i.e. (concretely) a sum owed.

G3783.definition: from (the alternate of) ὀφείλω; something owed, i.e. (figuratively) a due.

G3784.definition: probably from the base of ὄφελος (through the idea of accruing); to owe (pecuniarily); figuratively, to be under obligation (ought, must, should).
G3784.kjv: morally, to fail in duty:--behove, be bound, (be) debt(-or), (be) due(-ty), be guilty (indebted), (must) need(-s), ought, owe, should. See also ὄφελον.

G3785.definition: first person singular of a past tense of ὀφείλω.
G3785.kjv: I ought (wish), i.e. (interjection) oh that!:--would (to God).

G3786.definition: from  (to heap up, i.e. accumulate or benefit).

G3788.definition: from ὀπτάνομαι; the eye (literally or figuratively); by implication, vision.
G3788.kjv: figuratively, envy (from the jealous side-glance):--eye, sight.

G3789.definition: probably from ὀπτάνομαι (through the idea of sharpness of vision).
G3789.kjv: a snake, figuratively, (as a type of sly cunning) an artful malicious person, especially Satan:--serpent.

G3790.definition: perhaps from ὀπτάνομαι (through the idea of the shading or proximity to the organ of vision).
G3790.kjv: the eye-"brow" or forehead, i.e. (figuratively) the brink of a precipice:--brow.

G3791.kjv: to mob, i.e. (by implication) to harass:--vex.

G3792.kjv: to make a crowd, i.e. raise a public disturbance:--gather a company.

G3793.definition: from a derivative of ἔχω (meaning a vehicle); a throng (as borne along); by implication, the rabble; by extension, a class of people.
G3793.kjv: figuratively, a riot:--company, multitude, number (of people), people, press.

G3794.definition: from a remote derivative of ἔχω (meaning to fortify, through the idea of holding safely).

G3795.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of the base of ὀπτός.
G3795.kjv: a relish to other food (as if cooked sauce), i.e. (specially), fish (presumably salted and dried as a condiment):--fish.

G3796.definition: from the same as ὀπίσω (through the idea of backwardness); (adverbially) late in the day.
G3796.kjv: by extension, after the close of the day:--(at) even, in the end.

G3798.kjv: feminine (as noun) afternoon (early eve) or nightfall (later eve):--even(-ing, (-tide)).

G3799.kjv: properly, sight (the act), i.e. (by implication) the visage, an external show:--appearance, countenance, face.

G3800.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of the same as ὀψάριον.
G3800.kjv: rations for a soldier, i.e. (by extension) his stipend or pay:-- wages.

G3801.lemma: ὁ ὢν καί ὁ ἦν καί ὁ ἐρχόμενος
G3801.xlit: ho ṑn kaí ho ēn kaí ho erchómenos
G3801.pron: ho own kahee ho ane kahee ho er-khom'-en-os
G3801.definition: a phrase combining ὁ with the present participle and imperfect of εἰμί and the present participle of ἔρχομαι by means of καί.
G3801.kjv: the one being and the one that was and the one coming, i.e. the Eternal, as a divine epithet of Christ:--which art (is, was), and (which) wast (is, was), and art (is) to come (shalt be).

G3803.definition: from πήγνυμι; a trap (as fastened by a noose or notch).

G3804.definition: from a presumed derivative of πάθος; something undergone, i.e. hardship or pain.
G3804.kjv: subjectively, an emotion or influence:-- affection, affliction, motion, suffering.

G3806.kjv: properly, suffering ("pathos"), i.e. (subjectively) a passion (especially concupiscence):-- (inordinate) affection, lust.

G3807.definition: from παῖς and a reduplicated form of ἄγω; a boy-leader, i.e. a servant whose office it was to take the children to school.

G3808.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of παῖς.

G3809.definition: from παιδεύω; tutorage, i.e. education or training.
G3809.kjv: by implication, disciplinary correction:--chastening, chastisement, instruction, nurture.

G3810.kjv: a trainer, i.e. teacher or (by implication) discipliner:--which corrected, instructor.

G3811.kjv: to train up a child, i.e. educate, or (by implication), discipline (by punishment):--chasten(-ise), instruct, learn, teach.

G3813.definition: neuter diminutive of παῖς; a childling (of either sex), i.e. (properly), an infant, or (by extension) a half-grown boy or girl.
G3813.kjv: figuratively, an immature Christian:--(little, young) child, damsel.

G3814.kjv: a girl, i.e. (specially), a female slave or servant:--bondmaid(-woman), damsel, maid(-en).

G3816.definition: perhaps from παίω; a boy (as often beaten with impunity), or (by analogy), a girl, and (genitive case) a child; specially, a slave or servant (especially a minister to a king.
G3816.kjv: and by eminence to God):--child, maid(-en), (man) servant, son, young man.

G3817.definition: a primary verb; to hit (as if by a single blow and less violently than τύπτω).
G3817.kjv: specially, to sting (as a scorpion):--smite, strike.

G3818.definition: feminine of an adjective of uncertain derivation.

G3819.definition: probably another form for πάλιν (through the idea of retrocession); (adverbially) formerly, or (by relatively) sometime since.
G3819.kjv: (elliptically as adjective) ancient:--any while, a great while ago, (of) old, in time past.

G3820.kjv: antique, i.e. not recent, worn out:--old.

G3822.kjv: to make (passively, become) worn out, or declare obsolete:--decay, make (wax) old.

G3823.definition: from  (to vibrate; another form for βάλλω).

G3824.definition: from πάλιν and γένεσις; (spiritual) rebirth (the state or the act), i.e. (figuratively) spiritual renovation.

G3825.definition: probably from the same as πάλη (through the idea of oscillatory repetition).
G3825.kjv: (adverbially) anew, i.e. (of place) back, (of time) once more, or (conjunctionally) furthermore or on the other hand:--again.

G3826.definition: dative case (adverb) of a compound of πᾶς and πλῆθος.
G3826.kjv: in full multitude, i.e. concertedly or simultaneously:--all at once.

G3828.definition: from a compound of πᾶς and πυρά; every-tribal, i.e. heterogeneous (χώρα being implied).
G3828.kjv: Pamphylia, a region of Asia Minor:--Pamphylia.

G3829.definition: neuter of a presumed compound of πᾶς and a derivative of δέχομαι.
G3829.kjv: all-receptive, i.e. a public lodging-place (caravanserai or khan):--inn.

G3831.definition: from πᾶς and a derivative of ἀγορά.
G3831.kjv: a mass-meeting, i.e. (figuratively) universal companionship:--general assembly.

G3832.kjv: with the whole family:--with all his house.

G3833.definition: from a compound of πᾶς and ὅπλον.

G3834.kjv: adroitness, i.e. (in a bad sense) trickery or sophistry:--(cunning) craftiness, subtilty.

G3837.definition: genitive case (as adverb of place) of a presumed derivative of πᾶς.

G3838.kjv: full-ended, i.e. entire (neuter as noun, completion):--+ in (no) wise, uttermost.

G3840.kjv: from (i.e. on) all sides:--on every side, round about.

G3841.kjv: the all-ruling, i.e. God (as absolute and universal sovereign):--Almighty, Omnipotent.

G3842.kjv: every when, i.e. at all times:--alway(-s), ever(-more).

G3843.kjv: specially, at all events, (with negative, following) in no event:--by all means, altogether, at all, needs, no doubt, in (no) wise, surely.

G3844.kjv: i.e. (with genitive case) from beside (literally or figuratively), (with dative case) at (or in) the vicinity of (objectively or subjectively), (with accusative case) to the proximity with (local (especially beyond or opposed to) or causal (on account of):--above, against, among, at, before, by, contrary to, X friend, from, + give (such things as they), + that (she) had, X his, in, more than, nigh unto, (out) of, past, save, side…by, in the sight of, than, (there-)fore, with. In compounds it retains the same variety of application.

G3845.definition: from παρά and the base of βάσις.
G3845.kjv: to go contrary to, i.e. violate a command:--(by) transgress(-ion).

G3846.kjv: to throw alongside, i.e. (reflexively) to reach a place, or (figuratively) to liken:--arrive, compare.

G3849.definition: from παρά and the middle voice of βιάζω.
G3849.kjv: to force contrary to (nature), i.e. compel (by entreaty):--constrain.

G3850.kjv: a similitude ("parable"), i.e. (symbolic) fictitious narrative (of common life conveying a moral), apothegm or adage:--comparison, figure, parable, proverb.

G3851.definition: from παρά and the middle voice of βουλεύω.

G3853.definition: from παρά and the base of ἄγγελος.
G3853.kjv: to transmit a message, i.e. (by implication) to enjoin:--(give in) charge, (give) command(-ment), declare.

G3854.definition: from παρά and γίνομαι; to become near, i.e. approach (have arrived).
G3854.kjv: by implication, to appear publicly:--come, go, be present.

G3855.kjv: to lead near, i.e. (reflexively or intransitively) to go along or away:--depart, pass (away, by, forth).

G3856.kjv: to show alongside (the public), i.e. expose to infamy:--make a public example, put to an open shame.

G3857.kjv: a park, i.e. (specially), an Eden (place of future happiness, "paradise"):--paradise.

G3858.kjv: to accept near, i.e. admit or (by implication) delight in:--receive.

G3859.definition: from a compound of παρά and διατρίβω.

G3860.kjv: to surrender, i.e yield up, intrust, transmit:--betray, bring forth, cast, commit, deliver (up), give (over, up), hazard, put in prison, recommend.

G3861.definition: from παρά and δόξα (in the sense of seeming).

G3862.definition: from παραδίδωμι; transmission, i.e. (concretely) a precept.
G3862.kjv: specially, the Jewish traditionary law:--ordinance, tradition.

G3863.kjv: to stimulate alongside, i.e. excite to rivalry:--provoke to emulation (jealousy).

G3864.kjv: along the sea, i.e. maritime (lacustrine):--upon the sea coast.

G3867.kjv: to mispraise, i.e. recommend or advise (a different course):--admonish, exhort.

G3868.definition: from παρά and the middle voice of αἰτέω.
G3868.kjv: to beg off, i.e. deprecate, decline, shun:--avoid, (make) excuse, intreat, refuse, reject.

G3870.kjv: to call near, i.e. invite, invoke (by imploration, hortation or consolation):--beseech, call for, (be of good) comfort, desire, (give) exhort(-ation), intreat, pray.

G3872.definition: from a compound of παρά and κατατίθημι.
G3872.kjv: something put down alongside, i.e. a deposit (sacred trust):--that (thing) which is committed (un-)to (trust).

G3873.kjv: to lie near, i.e. be at hand (figuratively, be prompt or easy):--be present.

G3874.kjv: imploration, hortation, solace:--comfort, consolation, exhortation, intreaty.

G3877.kjv: to follow near, i.e. (figuratively) attend (as a result), trace out, conform to:--attain, follow, fully know, have understanding.

G3878.kjv: to mishear, i.e. (by implication) to disobey:--neglect to hear.

G3879.kjv: to bend beside, i.e. lean over (so as to peer within):--look (into), stoop down.

G3880.definition: from παρά and λαμβάνω; to receive near, i.e. associate with oneself (in any familiar or intimate act or relation); by analogy, to assume an office.

G3881.definition: from παρά and the middle voice of λέγω (in its original sense).
G3881.kjv: (specially), to lay one's course near, i.e. sail past:--pass, sail by.

G3882.kjv: beside the salt (sea), i.e. maritime:--sea coast.

G3883.definition: from a compound of παρά and ἀλλάσσω.
G3883.kjv: transmutation (of phase or orbit), i.e. (figuratively) fickleness:--variableness.

G3885.kjv: as if dissolved, i.e. "paralytic":--that had (sick of) the palsy.

G3886.kjv: to loosen beside, i.e. relax (perfect passive participle, paralyzed or enfeebled):--feeble, sick of the (taken with) palsy.

G3887.definition: from παρά and μένω; to stay near, i.e. remain (literally, tarry.
G3887.kjv: or figuratively, be permanent, persevere):--abide, continue.

G3888.definition: from παρά and the middle voice of a derivative of μῦθος.
G3888.kjv: to relate near, i.e. (by implication) encourage, console:--comfort.

G3891.definition: from a compound of παρά and νόμος.
G3891.kjv: to be opposed to law, i.e. to transgress:--contrary to law.

G3893.kjv: to embitter alongside, i.e. (figuratively) to exasperate:--provoke.

G3895.kjv: to fall aside, i.e. (figuratively) to apostatize:--fall away.

G3897.definition: neuter of a compound of παρά and the base of πλησίον (as adverb).

G3898.definition: adverb from the same as παραπλήσιον.
G3898.kjv: in a manner near by, i.e. (figuratively) similarly:--likewise.

G3900.kjv: a side-slip (lapse or deviation), i.e. (unintentional) error or (wilful) transgression:--fall, fault, offence, sin, trespass.

G3901.definition: from παρά and the alternate of ῥέω.
G3901.kjv: to flow by, i.e. (figuratively) carelessly pass (miss):--let slip.

G3902.definition: from παρά and the base of σημαίνω.
G3902.kjv: side-marked, i.e. labelled (with a badge (figure-head) of a ship):--sign.

G3903.definition: from παρά and a derivative of σκεῦος.
G3903.kjv: to furnish aside, i.e. get ready:--prepare self, be (make) ready.

G3905.kjv: to extend along, i.e. prolong (in point of time):--continue.

G3906.kjv: to inspect alongside, i.e. note insidiously or scrupulously:--observe, watch.

G3908.definition: from παρά and τίθημι; to place alongside, i.e. present (food, truth).
G3908.kjv: by implication, to deposit (as a trust or for protection):--allege, commend, commit (the keeping of), put forth, set before.

G3909.kjv: to chance near, i.e. fall in with:--meet with.

G3910.definition: from παρά and a derivative of αὐτός.
G3910.kjv: at the very instant, i.e. momentary:--but for a moment.

G3911.definition: from παρά and φέρω (including its alternate forms); to bear along or aside, i.e. carry off (literally or figuratively).
G3911.kjv: by implication, to avert:--remove, take away.

G3912.kjv: to misthink, i.e. be insane (silly):--as a fool.

G3914.kjv: to winter near, i.e. stay with over the rainy season:--winter.

G3916.definition: from παρά and χρῆμα (in its original sense).
G3916.kjv: at the thing itself, i.e. instantly:--forthwith, immediately, presently, straightway, soon.

G3918.definition: from παρά and εἰμί (including its various forms); to be near, i.e. at hand.
G3918.kjv: neuter present participle (singular) time being, or (plural) property:--come, X have, be here, + lack, (be here) present.

G3919.kjv: to lead in aside, i.e. introduce surreptitiously:--privily bring in.

G3921.definition: from παρά and a compound of εἰς and δύνω.
G3921.kjv: to settle in alongside, i.e. lodge stealthily:--creep in unawares.

G3922.kjv: to come in alongside, i.e. supervene additionally or steathily:--come in privily, enter.

G3923.kjv: to bear in alongside, i.e. introduce simultaneously:--give.

G3924.kjv: near outside, i.e. besides:--except, saving, without.

G3925.definition: from a compound of παρά and ἐμβάλλω.
G3925.kjv: a throwing in beside (juxtaposition), i.e. (specially), battle-array, encampment or barracks (tower Antonia):--army, camp, castle.

G3927.definition: from παρά and the base of ἐπιδημέω.
G3927.kjv: an alien alongside, i.e. a resident foreigner:--pilgrim, stranger.

G3928.kjv: to come near or aside, i.e. to approach (arrive), go by (or away), (figuratively) perish or neglect, (causative) avert:--come (forth), go, pass (away, by, over), past, transgress.

G3930.kjv: to hold near, i.e. present, afford, exhibit, furnish occasion:--bring, do, give, keep, minister, offer, shew, + trouble.

G3931.definition: from a compound of παρά and a derivative of ἀγορά (meaning to harangue an assembly).

G3934.kjv: a Parthian, i.e. inhabitant of Parthia:--Parthian.

G3935.kjv: to let by, i.e. relax:--hang down.

G3936.definition: from παρά and ἵστημι; to stand beside, i.e. (transitively) to exhibit, proffer, (specially), recommend, (figuratively) substantiate.
G3936.kjv: or (intransitively) to be at hand (or ready), aid:--assist, bring before, command, commend, give presently, present, prove, provide, shew, stand (before, by, here, up, with), yield.

G3937.definition: probably by contraction for  (a derivative of a compound of παρά and μένω); constant.

G3939.kjv: to dwell near, i.e. reside as a foreigner:--sojourn in, be a stranger.

G3941.kjv: having a home near, i.e. (as noun) a by-dweller (alien resident):--foreigner, sojourn, stranger.

G3942.definition: from a compound of παρά and perhaps a derivative of οἴομαι; apparently a state alongside of supposition, i.e. (concretely) an adage.
G3942.kjv: specially, an enigmatical or fictitious illustration:--parable, proverb.

G3943.kjv: staying near wine, i.e. tippling (a toper):--given to wine.

G3944.kjv: to escape along, i.e. be gone:--past.

G3947.definition: from παρά and a derivative of ὀξύς.
G3947.kjv: to sharpen alongside, i.e. (figuratively) to exasperate:--easily provoke, stir.

G3948.kjv: incitement (to good), or dispute (in anger):--contention, provoke unto.

G3949.kjv: to anger alongside, i.e. enrage:--anger, provoke to wrath.

G3951.kjv: to urge along, i.e. stimulate (to hostility):--stir up.

G3952.definition: from the present participle of πάρειμι; a being near, i.e. advent (often, return; specially, of Christ to punish Jerusalem, or finally the wicked).

G3953.definition: from παρά and the base of ὀψάριον.

G3954.definition: from πᾶς and a derivative of ῥέω; all out-spokenness, i.e. frankness, bluntness, publicity.
G3954.kjv: by implication, assurance:--bold (X -ly, -ness, -ness of speech), confidence, X freely, X openly, X plainly(-ness).

G3955.kjv: to be frank in utterance, or confident in spirit and demeanor:--be (wax) bold, (preach, speak) boldly.

G3956.definition: including all the forms of declension; apparently a primary word.
G3956.kjv: all, any, every, the whole:--all (manner of, means), alway(-s), any (one), X daily, + ever, every (one, way), as many as, + no(-thing), X thoroughly, whatsoever, whole, whosoever.

G3957.kjv: the Passover (the meal, the day, the festival or the special sacrifices connected with it):--Easter, Passover.

G3958.kjv: to experience a sensation or impression (usually painful):--feel, passion, suffer, vex.

G3959.kjv: Patara, a place in Asia Minor:--Patara.

G3960.kjv: to knock (gently or with a weapon or fatally):--smite, strike. Compare τύπτω.

G3961.definition: from a derivative probably of παίω (meaning a "path").
G3961.kjv: to trample (literally or figuratively):--tread (down, under foot).

G3962.kjv: a "father" (literally or figuratively, near or more remote):--father, parent.

G3963.kjv: Patmus, an islet in the Mediterranean:--Patmos.

G3964.definition: from πατήρ and the same as the latter part of μητραλῴας.

G3965.definition: as if feminine of a derivative of πατήρ.
G3965.kjv: paternal descent, i.e. (concretely) a group of families or a whole race (nation):--family, kindred, lineage.

G3968.definition: from παράσημος; a father-land, i.e. native town.

G3969.definition: perhaps a contraction for  (a compound of πατήρ and βίος); father's life.

G3970.definition: from πατήρ and a derivative of παραδίδωμι (in the sense of handing over or down).

G3972.definition: of Latin origin; (little; but remotely from a derivative of παύω, meaning the same).
G3972.kjv: Paulus, the name of a Roman and of an apostle:--Paul, Paulus.

G3973.kjv: to stop (transitively or intransitively), i.e. restrain, quit, desist, come to an end:--cease, leave, refrain.

G3975.definition: from a derivative of πήγνυμι (meaning thick).
G3975.kjv: to thicken, i.e. (by implication) to fatten (figuratively, stupefy or render callous):--wax gross.

G3977.definition: from a derivative of πούς (meaning the ground).

G3978.kjv: to foot a journey, i.e. travel by land:--go afoot.

G3979.definition: dative case feminine of a derivative of πούς (as adverb).

G3980.definition: from a compound of πείθω and ἄρχω; to be persuaded by a ruler, i.e. (genitive case) to submit to authority.
G3980.kjv: by analogy, to conform to advice:--hearken, obey (magistrates).

G3982.definition: a primary verb; to convince (by argument, true or false); by analogy, to pacify or conciliate (by other fair means).
G3982.kjv: reflexively or passively, to assent (to evidence or authority), to rely (by inward certainty):--agree, assure, believe, have confidence, be (wax) conflent, make friend, obey, persuade, trust, yield.

G3983.definition: from the same as πένης (through the idea of pinching toil; "pine"); to famish (absolutely or comparatively).

G3984.definition: from the base of πέραν (through the idea of piercing).
G3984.kjv: a test, i.e. attempt, experience:--assaying, trial.

G3985.kjv: to test (objectively), i.e. endeavor, scrutinize, entice, discipline:--assay, examine, go about, prove, tempt(-er), try.

G3986.definition: from πειράζω; a putting to proof (by experiment (of good), experience (of evil), solicitation, discipline or provocation).

G3988.definition: from a presumed derivative of πείθω.

G3989.kjv: deep or open sea, i.e. the main:--depth, sea.

G3990.definition: from a derivative of πλήσσω (meaning an axe).
G3990.kjv: to chop off (the head), i.e. truncate:--behead.

G3992.definition: apparently a primary verb; to dispatch (from the subjective view or point of departure, whereas  (as a stronger form of ) refers rather to the objective point or terminus ad quem, and στέλλω denotes properly, the orderly motion involved), especially on a temporary errand.
G3992.kjv: also to transmit, bestow, or wield:--send, thrust in.

G3993.definition: from a primary  (to toil for daily subsistence).

G3994.kjv: a wife's mother:--mother in law, wife's mother.

G3996.kjv: to grieve (the feeling or the act):--mourn, (be-)wail.

G3997.definition: strengthened from the alternate of πάσχω.

G3998.definition: prolongation from the base of πένης.

G4003.definition: from πέντε and καί and δέκατος.

G4005.definition: feminine of the ordinal of πεντήκοντα.
G4005.kjv: fiftieth (ἡμέρα being implied) from Passover, i.e. the festival of "Pentecost":--Pentecost.

G4006.definition: from the perfect of the alternate of πάσχω.

G4007.definition: from the base of πέραν; an enclitic particle significant of abundance (thoroughness), i.e. emphasis.

G4008.definition: apparently accusative case of an obsolete derivative of  (to "pierce").
G4008.kjv: through (as adverb or preposition), i.e. across:--beyond, farther (other) side, over.

G4010.kjv: Pergamus, a place in Asia Minor:--Pergamos.

G4011.definition: probably from the same as Πέργαμος; a tower.
G4011.kjv: Perga, a place in Asia Minor:--Perga.

G4012.definition: from the base of πέραν; properly, through (all over), i.e. around; figuratively with respect to; used in various applications, of place, cause or time (with the genitive case denoting the subject or occasion or superlative point.
G4012.kjv: with the accusative case the locality, circuit, matter, circumstance or general period):--(there-)about, above, against, at, on behalf of, X and his company, which concern, (as) concerning, for, X how it will go with, ((there-, where-)) of, on, over, pertaining (to), for sake, X (e-)state, (as) touching, (where-)by (in), with. In comparative, it retains substantially the same meaning of circuit (around), excess (beyond), or completeness (through).

G4013.definition: from περί and ἄγω; to take around (as a companion).

G4254.kjv: intransitively, to precede (in place or time (participle, previous)):--bring (forth, out), go before.

G4255.kjv: to choose for oneself before another thing (prefer), i.e. (by implication) to propose (intend):--purpose.

G4256.definition: from πρό and a derivative of αἰτία.
G4256.kjv: to accuse already, i.e. previously charge:--prove before.

G4258.kjv: to sin previously (to conversion):--sin already, heretofore sin.

G4259.definition: neuter of a presumed compound of πρό and αὐλή.

G4260.definition: from πρό and the base of βάσις.

G4261.kjv: to throw forward, i.e. push to the front, germinate:--put forward, shoot forth.

G4262.kjv: relating to sheep, i.e. (a gate) through which they were led into Jerusalem:--sheep (market).

G4263.definition: probably neuter of a presumed derivative of προβαίνω.
G4263.kjv: something that walks forward (a quadruped), i.e. (specially), a sheep (literally or figuratively):--sheep(-fold).

G4264.definition: from πρό and a reduplicated form of βιάζω.
G4264.kjv: to force forward, i.e. bring to the front, instigate:--draw, before instruct.

G4265.kjv: to look out beforehand, i.e. furnish in advance:--provide.

G4266.kjv: to be already, i.e. have previousy transpired:--be past.

G4267.kjv: to know beforehand, i.e. foresee:--foreknow (ordain), know (before).

G4270.definition: from πρό and γράφω; to write previously.
G4270.kjv: figuratively, to announce, prescribe:--before ordain, evidently set forth, write (afore, aforetime).

G4271.kjv: plain before all men, i.e. obvious:--evident, manifest (open) beforehand.

G4272.kjv: to give before the other party has given:--first give.

G4273.definition: from προδίδωμι (in the sense of giving forward into another's (the enemy's) hands).

G4274.kjv: a runner ahead, i.e. scout (figuratively, precursor):--forerunner.

G4276.kjv: to hope in advance of other confirmation:--first trust.

G4277.kjv: to say already, to predict:--forewarn, say (speak, tell) before. Compare προερέω.

G4279.definition: middle voice from πρό and ἐπαγγέλλω.

G4280.definition: from πρό and ἐρέω; used as alternate of προέπω.
G4280.kjv: to say already, predict:--foretell, say (speak, tell) before.

G4281.definition: from πρό and ἔρχομαι (including its alternate).
G4281.kjv: to go onward, precede (in place or time):--go before (farther, forward), outgo, pass on.

G4282.kjv: to fit up in advance (literally or figuratively):--ordain before, prepare afore.

G4283.definition: middle voice from πρό and εὐαγγελίζω.
G4283.kjv: to announce glad news in advance:--preach before the gospel.

G4284.definition: middle voice from πρό and ἔχω.
G4284.kjv: to hold oneself before others, i.e. (figuratively) to excel:--be better.

G4285.kjv: to lead the way for others, i.e. show deference:--prefer.

G4286.definition: from προτίθεμαι; a setting forth, i.e. (figuratively) proposal (intention).
G4286.kjv: specially, the show-bread (in the Temple) as exposed before God:--purpose, shew(-bread).

G4287.definition: from πρό and a derivative of τίθημι.
G4287.kjv: fixed beforehand, i.e. (feminine with ἡμέρα implied) a designated day:--time appointed.

G4288.kjv: predisposition, i.e. alacrity:--forwardness of mind, readiness (of mind), ready (willing) mind.

G4289.definition: from πρό and θυμός; forward in spirit, i.e. predisposed.

G4291.kjv: to stand before, i.e. (in rank) to preside, or (by implication) to practise:--maintain, be over, rule.

G4292.definition: middle voice from πρό and καλέω.
G4292.kjv: to call forth to oneself (challenge), i.e. (by implication) to irritate:--provoke.

G4293.kjv: to anounce beforehand, i.e. predict, promise:--foretell, have notice, (shew) before.

G4294.kjv: to prepare in advance:--make up beforehand.

G4295.kjv: to lie before the view, i.e. (figuratively) to be present (to the mind), to stand forth (as an example or reward):--be first, set before (forth).

G4296.kjv: to herald (i.e. proclaim) in advance:--before (first) preach.

G4297.kjv: progress, i.e. advancement (subjectively or objectively):--furtherance, profit.

G4298.definition: from πρό and κόπτω; to drive forward (as if by beating), i.e. (figuratively and intransitively) to advance (in amount, to grow.
G4298.kjv: in time, to be well along):--increase, proceed, profit, be far spent, wax.

G4299.definition: from a compound of πρό and κρίνω.
G4299.kjv: a prejudgment (prejudice), i.e. prepossession:--prefer one before another.

G4301.definition: from πρό and λαμβάνω; to take in advance, i.e. (literally) eat before others have an opportunity.
G4301.kjv: (figuratively) to anticipate, surprise:--come aforehand, overtake, take before.

G4302.kjv: to say beforehand, i.e. predict, forewarn:--foretell, tell before.

G4303.kjv: to be a witness in advance i.e. predict:--testify beforehand.

G4305.kjv: to care (anxiously) in advance:--take thought beforehand.

G4306.definition: from πρό and νοιέω; to consider in advance, i.e. look out for beforehand (actively, by way of maintenance for others.
G4306.kjv: middle voice by way of circumspection for oneself):--provide (for).

G4307.kjv: forethought, i.e. provident care or supply:--providence, provision.

G4308.kjv: to behold in advance, i.e. (actively) to notice (another) previously, or (middle voice) to keep in (one's own) view:--foresee, see before.

G4309.kjv: to limit in advance, i.e. (figuratively) predetermine:--determine before, ordain, predestinate.

G4311.kjv: to send forward, i.e. escort or aid in travel:--accompany, bring (forward) on journey (way), conduct forth.

G4312.definition: from a compound of πρό and πίπτω.
G4312.kjv: falling forward, i.e. headlong (figuratively, precipitate):--heady, rash(-ly).

G4313.kjv: to precede (as guide or herald):--go before.

G4314.definition: a strengthened form of πρό; a preposition of direction; forward to, i.e. toward (with the genitive case, the side of, i.e. pertaining to; with the dative case, by the side of, i.e. near to.
G4314.kjv: usually with the accusative case, the place, time, occasion, or respect, which is the destination of the relation, i.e. whither or for which it is predicated):--about, according to , against, among, at, because of, before, between, (where-)by, for, X at thy house, in, for intent, nigh unto, of, which pertain to, that, to (the end that), X together, to (you) -ward, unto, with(-in). In the comparative case, it denotes essentially the same applications, namely, motion towards, accession to, or nearness at.

G4315.kjv: a fore-sabbath, i.e. the Sabbath-eve:--day before the sabbath. Compare παρασκευή.

G4316.definition: from πρός and a derivative of ἀγορά (mean to harangue).
G4316.kjv: to address, i.e. salute by name:--call.

G4317.kjv: to lead towards, i.e. (transitively) to conduct near (summon, present), or (intransitively) to approach:--bring, draw near.

G4320.kjv: to ascend farther, i.e. be promoted (take an upper (more honorable) seat):--go up.

G4322.kjv: to fill up further, i.e. furnish fully:--supply.

G4323.kjv: to lay up in addition, i.e. (middle voice and figuratively) to impart or (by implication) to consult:--in conference add, confer.

G4326.kjv: to require additionally, i.e. want further:--need.

G4327.definition: from πρός and δέχομαι; to admit (to intercourse, hospitality, credence, or (figuratively) endurance).
G4327.kjv: by implication, to await (with confidence or patience):--accept, allow, look (wait) for, take.

G4328.definition: from πρός and dokeuo (to watch); to anticipate (in thought, hope or fear).
G4328.kjv: by implication, to await:--(be in) expect(-ation), look (for), when looked, tarry, wait for.

G4329.kjv: by implication, infliction anticipated:--expectation, looking after.

G4332.definition: from a compound of πρός and the base of ἑδραῖος.
G4332.kjv: to sit near, i.e. attend as a servant:--wait at.

G4333.kjv: to work additionally, i.e. (by implication) acquire besides:--gain.

G4334.definition: from πρός and ἔρχομαι (including its alternate).
G4334.kjv: to approach, i.e. (literally) come near, visit, or (figuratively) worship, assent to:--(as soon as he) come (unto), come thereunto, consent, draw near, go (near, to, unto).

G4335.kjv: by implication, an oratory (chapel):--X pray earnestly, prayer.

G4336.kjv: to pray to God, i.e. supplicate, worship:--pray (X earnestly, for), make prayer.

G4337.definition: from πρός and ἔχω; (figuratively) to hold the mind (3563 implied) towards, i.e. pay attention to, be cautious about, apply oneself to, adhere to:--(give) attend(-ance, -ance at, -ance to, unto), beware, be given to, give (take) heed (to unto).

G4338.definition: from πρός and a derivative of ἧλος.
G4338.kjv: to peg to, i.e. spike fast:--nail to.

G4339.kjv: an arriver from a foreign region, i.e. (specially), an acceder (convert) to Judaism ("proselyte"):--proselyte.

G4340.kjv: for the occasion only, i.e. temporary:--dur-(eth) for awhile, endure for a time, for a season, temporal.

G4341.definition: middle voice from πρός and καλέω.
G4341.kjv: to call toward oneself, i.e. summon, invite:--call (for, to, unto).

G4344.definition: neuter of a presumed compound of πρός and κεφαλή.
G4344.kjv: something for the head, i.e. a cushion:--pillow.

G4345.kjv: to give a common lot to, i.e. (figuratively) to associate with:--consort with.

G4346.definition: from a compound of πρός and κλίνω.

G4347.kjv: to glue to, i.e. (figuratively) to adhere:--cleave, join (self).

G4348.kjv: a stub, i.e. (figuratively) occasion of apostasy:--offence, stumbling(-block, (-stone)).

G4349.kjv: a stumbling, i.e. (figuratively and concretely) occasion of sin:--offence.

G4350.definition: from πρός and κόπτω; to strike at, i.e. surge against (as water).
G4350.kjv: specially, to stub on, i.e. trip up (literally or figuratively):--beat upon, dash, stumble (at).

G4351.kjv: to roll towards, i.e. block against:--roll (to).

G4352.definition: from πρός and a probable derivative of κύων (meaning to kiss, like a dog licking his master's hand).
G4352.kjv: to fawn or crouch to, i.e. (literally or figuratively) prostrate oneself in homage (do reverence to, adore):--worship.

G4354.kjv: to talk to, i.e. converse with:--speak to (with).

G4355.kjv: to take to oneself, i.e. use (food), lead (aside), admit (to friendship or hospitality):--receive, take (unto).

G4357.definition: from πρός and μένω; to stay further, i.e. remain in a place, with a person.
G4357.kjv: figuratively, to adhere to, persevere in:--abide still, be with, cleave unto, continue in (with).

G4358.definition: from πρός and a derivative of the same as ὁρμή (meaning to tie (anchor) or lull).
G4358.kjv: to moor to, i.e. (by implication) land at:--draw to the shore.

G4360.definition: from πρός and a form of  (to be vexed with something irksome).

G4361.definition: from πρός and the same as πεινάω.
G4361.kjv: hungering further, i.e. intensely hungry:--very hungry.

G4362.kjv: to fasten to, i.e. (specially), to impale (on a cross):--crucify.

G4363.kjv: to fall towards, i.e. (gently) prostrate oneself (in supplication or homage), or (violently) to rush upon (in storm):--beat upon, fall (down) at (before).

G4364.definition: middle voice from πρός and ποιέω.
G4364.kjv: to do forward for oneself, i.e. pretend (as if about to do a thing):--make as though.

G4367.kjv: to arrange towards, i.e. (figuratively) enjoin:--bid, command.

G4368.definition: feminine of a derivative of προΐστημι.

G4369.kjv: to place additionally, i.e. lay beside, annex, repeat:--add, again, give more, increase, lay unto, proceed further, speak to any more.

G4370.definition: from πρός and τρέχω (including its alternate).
G4370.kjv: to run towards, i.e. hasten to meet or join:--run (thither to, to).

G4371.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of a compound of πρός and φάγω; something eaten in addition to bread, i.e. a relish (specially, fish.

G4372.definition: from πρό and a derivative of σφάζω.

G4374.definition: from πρός and φέρω (including its alternate).
G4374.kjv: to bear towards, i.e. lead to, tender (especially to God), treat:--bring (to, unto), deal with, do, offer (unto, up), present unto, put to.

G4375.definition: from a presumed compound of πρός and φιλέω.

G4377.kjv: to sound towards, i.e. address, exclaim, summon:--call unto, speak (un-)to.

G4378.definition: from a comparative of πρός and  (to pour).

G4379.kjv: to impinge, i.e. lay a finger on (in order to relieve):--touch.

G4380.kjv: to favor an individual, i.e. show partiality:--have respect to persons.

G4381.kjv: an accepter of a face (individual), i.e. (specially), one exhibiting partiality:--respecter of persons.

G4385.kjv: to protend, i.e. tie prostrate (for scourging):--bind.

G4386.definition: neuter of πρότερος as adverb (with or without the article).

G4388.definition: middle voice from πρό and τίθημι; to place before, i.e. (for oneself) to exhibit.

G4389.definition: middle voice from πρό and the base of τροπή.
G4389.kjv: to turn forward for oneself, i.e. encourage:--exhort.

G4390.definition: from πρό and τρέχω (including its alternate).
G4390.kjv: to run forward, i.e. outstrip, precede:--outrun, run before.

G4391.kjv: to exist before, i.e. (adverbially) to be or do something previously:--+ be before(-time).

G4392.definition: from a compound of πρό and φαίνω.
G4392.kjv: an outward showing, i.e. pretext:--cloke, colour, pretence, show.

G4393.kjv: to bear forward, i.e. produce:--bring forth.

G4395.kjv: to foretell events, divine, speak under inspiration, exercise the prophetic office:--prophesy.

G4396.definition: from a compound of πρό and φημί; a foreteller ("prophet"); by analogy, an inspired speaker.

G4397.kjv: pertaining to a foreteller ("prophetic"):--of prophecy, of the prophets.

G4398.kjv: a female foreteller or an inspired woman:--prophetess.

G4399.kjv: to get an earlier start of, i.e. anticipate:--prevent.

G4400.definition: middle voice from πρό and a derivative of χείρ.
G4400.kjv: to handle for oneself in advance, i.e. (figuratively) to purpose:--choose, make.

G4402.definition: from πρό and χορός; before the dance.

G4403.kjv: the stern of a ship:--hinder part, stern.

G4404.kjv: by implication, the day-break watch:--early (in the morning), (in the) morning.

G4405.definition: feminine of a derivative of πρωΐ as noun.

G4406.kjv: dawning, i.e. (by analogy) autumnal (showering, the first of the rainy season):--early.

G4407.kjv: pertaining to the dawn, i.e. matutinal:--morning.

G4408.definition: feminine of a presumed derivative of πρό as noun.
G4408.kjv: the prow, i.e. forward part of a vessel:--forepart(-ship).

G4409.kjv: to be first (in rank or influence):--have the preeminence.

G4412.definition: neuter of πρῶτος as adverb (with or without ὁ).

G4413.kjv: foremost (in time, place, order or importance):--before, beginning, best, chief(-est), first (of all), former.

G4416.definition: from πρῶτος and the alternate of τίκτω.
G4416.kjv: first-born (usually as noun, literally or figuratively):--firstbegotten(-born).

G4417.kjv: to trip, i.e. (figuratively) to err, sin, fail (of salvation):--fall, offend, stumble.

G4419.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of πτέρυξ.

G4420.definition: from a derivative of πέτομαι (meaning a feather).

G4422.definition: probably akin to the alternate of πίπτω (through the idea of causing to fall) or to πέτομαι (through that of causing to fly away).

G4424.definition: from  (Ptolemy, after whom it was named).

G4426.definition: from a presumed derivative of πτύω (and thus akin to πτοέω).

G4428.definition: probably akin to  (to spread; and thus apparently allied to πέτομαι through the idea of expansion, and to 4429 through that of flattening; compare πατέω).
G4428.kjv: to fold, i.e. furl a scroll:--close.

G4430.kjv: a ruin, i.e. (specially), lifeless body (corpse, carrion):--dead body, carcase, corpse.

G4431.kjv: a crash, i.e. downfall (literally or figuratively):--fall.

G4433.kjv: to be a beggar, i.e. (by implication) to become indigent (figuratively):--become poor.

G4434.definition: from  (to crouch); akin to πτοέω and the alternate of πίπτω); a beggar (as cringing), i.e. pauper (strictly denoting absolute or public mendicancy, although also used in a qualified or relative sense.
G4434.kjv: whereas πένης properly means only straitened circumstances in private), literally (often as noun) or figuratively (distressed):--beggar(-ly), poor.

G4435.definition: from a primary  (the fist as a weapon).
G4435.kjv: the clenched hand, i.e. (only in dative case as adverb) with the fist (hard scrubbing):--oft.

G4436.definition: from  (the name of the region where Delphi, the seat of the famous oracle, was located).
G4436.kjv: a Python, i.e. (by analogy, with the supposed diviner there) inspiration (soothsaying):-- divination.

G4437.definition: from the same as σκηνοποιός; clasped (thick), i.e. (figuratively) frequent.

G4438.definition: from a derivative of the same as πυγμή.
G4438.kjv: to box (with the fist), i.e. contend (as a boxer) at the games (figuratively):--fight.

G4439.kjv: a gate, i.e. the leaf or wing of a folding entrance (literally or figuratively):--gate.

G4440.kjv: by implication, a portal or vestibule:--gate, porch.

G4441.definition: middle voice prolonged from a primary  (which occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses); to question, i.e. ascertain by inquiry (as a matter of information merely; and thus differing from ἐρωτάω, which properly means a request as a favor; and from αἰτέω, which is strictly a demand for something due; as well as from ζητέω, which implies a search for something hidden; and from δέομαι, which involves the idea of urgent need).
G4441.kjv: by implication, to learn (by casual intelligence):--ask, demand, enquire, understand.

G4445.kjv: to be on fire, i.e. (specially), to have a fever:--be sick of a fever.

G4446.kjv: inflamed, i.e. (by implication) feverish (as noun, fever):--fever.

G4448.kjv: to kindle, i.e. (passively) to be ignited, glow (literally), be refined (by implication), or (figuratively) to be inflamed (with anger, grief, lust):--burn, fiery, be on fire, try.

G4451.kjv: ignition, i.e. (specially), smelting (figuratively, conflagration, calamity as a test):--burning, trial.

G4452.definition: another form of the base of -πώς; an enclitic particle of indefiniteness; yet, even.
G4452.kjv: used only in the comparative. See μηδέπω, μήπω, οὐδέπω, οὔπω, πώποτε.

G4453.definition: probably ultimately from  (to be busy, to trade).
G4453.kjv: to barter (as a pedlar), i.e. to sell:--sell, whatever is sold.

G4454.kjv: a "foal" or "filly", i.e. (specially), a young ass:--colt.

G4455.kjv: at any time, i.e. (with negative particle) at no time:--at any time, + never (…to any man), + yet, never man.

G4456.kjv: to petrify, i.e. (figuratively) to indurate (render stupid or callous):-- blind, harden.

G4458.definition: adverb from the base of πού; an enclitic particle of indefiniteness of manner; somehow or anyhow.
G4458.kjv: used only in composition:--haply, by any (some) means, perhaps. See εἴ πως, μήπως. Compare πῶς.

G4459.definition: adverb from the base of ποῦ; an interrogative particle of manner; in what way? (sometimes the question is indirect, how?).
G4459.kjv: also as exclamation, how much!:--how, after (by) what manner (means), that. (Occasionally unexpressed in English).

G4460.kjv: Raab (i.e. Rachab), a Canaanitess:--Rahab. See also Ῥαχάβ.

G4461.definition: of Hebrew origin (רַב with pronominal suffix).
G4461.kjv: my master, i.e Rabbi, as an official title of honor:--Master, Rabbi.

G4463.kjv: to strike with a stick, i.e. bastinado:--beat (with rods).

G4464.kjv: a stick or wand (as a cudgel, a cane or a baton of royalty):--rod, sceptre, staff.

G4465.kjv: a rod- (the Latin fasces) holder, i.e. a Roman lictor (constable or executioner):--serjeant.

G4467.definition: from a comparative of  (easy, i.e. reckless) and ἔργον.
G4467.kjv: easy-going behavior, i.e. (by extension) a crime:--lewdness.

G4469.kjv: O empty one, i.e. thou worthless (as a term of utter vilification):--Raca.

G4471.kjv: Rama (i.e. Ramah), a place in Palestine:--Rama.

G4472.kjv: to render besprinkled, i.e. asperse (ceremonially or figuratively):-- sprinkle.

G4474.definition: from a derivative of a primary  (to let fall, "rap").
G4474.kjv: to slap:--smite (with the palm of the hand). Compare τύπτω.

G4475.kjv: a slap:--(+ strike with the) palm of the hand, smite with the hand.

G4476.definition: from a primary  (to sew; perhaps rather akin to the base of ῥαπίζω through the idea of puncturing).

G4479.kjv: Rebecca (i.e. Ribkah), the wife of Isaac:--Rebecca.

G4480.kjv: a rheda, i.e. four-wheeled carriage (wagon for riding):--chariot.

G4481.definition: by incorrect transliteration for a word of Hebrew origin (כִּיּוּן).

G4482.definition: a primary verb; for some tenses of which a prolonged form         is used to flow ("run".

G4483.definition: ἔπωperhaps akin (or identical) with ῥέω (through the idea of pouring forth).
G4483.kjv: to utter, i.e. speak or say:--command, make, say, speak (of). Compare λέγω.

G4485.kjv: something torn, i.e. a fragment (by implication and abstractly, a fall):--ruin.

G4486.definition: both prolonged forms of  (which appears only in certain forms, and is itself probably a strengthened form of agnumi (see in κατάγνυμι)); to "break," "wreck" or "crack", i.e. (especially) to sunder (by separation of the parts; κατάγνυμι being its intensive (with the preposition in composition), and θραύω a shattering to minute fragments; but not a reduction to the constituent particles, like λύω) or disrupt, lacerate; by implication, to convulse (with spasms).
G4486.kjv: figuratively, to give vent to joyful emotions:--break (forth), burst, rend, tear.

G4487.definition: from ῥέω; an utterance (individually, collectively or specially),; by implication, a matter or topic (especially of narration, command or dispute).
G4487.kjv: with a negative naught whatever:--+ evil, + nothing, saying, word.

G4488.definition: probably of Hebrew origin (apparently for רְפָיָה).

G4489.kjv: a speaker, i.e. (by implication) a forensic advocate:--orator.

G4490.definition: adverb from a derivative of ῥέω.

G4496.kjv: by extension, to disperse:--cast (down, out), scatter abroad, throw.

G4499.kjv: Rhodus, an island of the Mediterranean:--Rhodes.

G4500.definition: adverb from a derivative of  (a whir).

G4501.kjv: a sabre, i.e. a long and broad cutlass (any weapon of the kind, literally or figuratively):--sword.

G4508.definition: from ῥύπος; dirty, i.e. (relatively) cheap or shabby.

G4512.kjv: a fold (as drawing together), i.e. a wrinkle (especially on the face):--wrinkle.

G4535.definition: probably from the base of σαίνω.

G4536.definition: perhaps from σάλος (through the idea of quavering or reverberation).

G4537.kjv: to trumpet, i.e. sound a blast (literally or figuratively):--(which are yet to) sound (a trumpet).

G4543.kjv: Samo-thrace (Samos of Thrace), an island in the Mediterranean:--Samothracia.

G4547.definition: neuter of a derivative of  (a "sandal"; of uncertain origin).

G4549.kjv: Saul (i.e. Shaul), the Jewish name of Paul:--Saul. Compare Σαῦλος.

G4550.kjv: rotten, i.e. worthless (literally or morally):--bad, corrupt. Compare πονηρός.

G4554.kjv: Sardis, a place in Asia Minor:--Sardis.

G4558.kjv: Sarepta (i.e. Tsarephath), a place in Palestine:--Sarepta.

G4559.kjv: pertaining to flesh, i.e. (by extension) bodily, temporal, or (by implication) animal, unregenerate:--carnal, fleshly.

G4563.definition: from a derivative of  (to brush off; akin to σύρω); meaning a broom.

G4564.kjv: Sarra (i.e. Sarah), the wife of Abraham:--Sara, Sarah.

G4565.kjv: Saron (i.e. Sharon), a district of Palestine:--Saron.

G4566.kjv: Satan, i.e. the devil:--Satan. Compare Σατανᾶς.

G4569.kjv: Saulus (i.e. Shaul), the Jewish name of Paul:--Saul.

G4570.definition: a prolonged form of an apparently primary verb.
G4570.kjv: to extinguish (literally or figuratively):--go out, quench.

G4572.definition: genitive case from σέ and αὐτός,                             also dative case of the same,        ,  and accusative case        , likewise contracted        ,        ,     and        ,    respectively.

G4576.definition: middle voice of an apparently primary verb.

G4577.definition: probably from σύρω through its congener  (to fasten; akin to αἱρέομαι).

G4582.definition: from  (brilliancy; probably akin to the alternate of αἱρέομαι, through the idea of attractiveness).

G4583.definition: middle voice or passive from a presumed derivative of σελήνη.

G4599.kjv: to strengthen, i.e. (figuratively) confirm (in spiritual knowledge and power):--strengthen.

G4600.kjv: the jaw-bone, i.e. (by implication) the cheek or side of the face:--cheek.

G4601.kjv: to keep silent (transitively or intransitively):--keep close (secret, silence), hold peace.

G4602.definition: apparently from  (to hiss, i.e. hist or hush).

G4606.kjv: a Sidonian, i.e. inhabitant of Sidon:--of Sidon.

G4642.kjv: dry, i.e. hard or tough (figuratively, harsh, severe):--fierce, hard.

G4650.definition: apparently from the same as σκορπίος (through the idea of penetrating).

G4651.definition: probably from an obsolete  (perhaps strengthened from the base of σκοπός and meaning to pierce).

G4672.kjv: Solomon (i.e. Shelomoh), the son of David:--Solomon.

G4673.kjv: a funereal receptacle (urn, coffin), i.e. (by analogy) a bier:--bier.

G4687.kjv: to scatter, i.e. sow (literally or figuratively):--sow(- er), receive seed.

G4693.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of  (a grotto); a cavern.

G4708.kjv: more speedily, i.e. sooner than otherwise:--more carefully.

G4730.definition: from a compound of στενός and χώρα.

G4737.kjv: to adorn with an honorary wreath (literally or figuratively):--crown.

G4760.definition: from the base of στρατιά and the same as πεδινός.

G4763.definition: from a presumed derivative of στρῆνος.

G4767.definition: from a derivative of an obsolete apparently primary  (to hate).

G4771.kjv: and for the plural ὑμᾶς, ὑμεῖς, ὑμῖν, ὑμῶν.

G4774.definition: from a compound of σύν and γινώσκω.

G4778.kjv: to maltreat in company with, i.e. (passively) endure persecution together:--suffer affliction with.

G4784.kjv: to deposit (one's vote or opinion) in company with, i.e. (figuratively) to accord with:--consent.

G4795.definition: from a comparative of σύν and  (to light or happen; from the base of κύριος).

G4796.kjv: to sympathize in gladness, congratulate:--rejoice in (with).

G4797.kjv: to commingle promiscuously, i.e. (figuratively) to throw (an assembly) into disorder, to perplex (the mind):--confound, confuse, stir up, be in an uproar.

G4816.definition: from σύν and λέγω in its original sense.

G4834.kjv: to feel "sympathy" with, i.e. (by implication) to commiserate:--have compassion, be touched with a feeling of.

G4839.kjv: to remain in company, i.e. still live:--continue with.

G4848.kjv: by implication, to assemble:--go with, resort.

G4868.kjv: to make up together, i.e. (figuratively) to compute (an account):--reckon, take.

G4889.kjv: a co-slave, i.e. servitor or ministrant of the same master (human or divine):--fellowservant.

G4962.kjv: to twist together, i.e. collect (a bundle, a crowd):--gather.

G4966.kjv: Sychem (i.e. Shekem), the name of a Canaanite and of a place in Palestine:--Sychem.

G4971.definition: adverb from the same as σφόδρα.

G4975.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of the alternate of ἔχω as adverb.

G4976.kjv: a figure (as a mode or circumstance), i.e. (by implication) external condition:--fashion.

G4977.kjv: to split or sever (literally or figuratively):--break, divide, open, rend, make a rent.

G4978.kjv: a split or gap ("schism"), literally or figuratively:--division, rent, schism.

G4982.kjv: to save, i.e. deliver or protect (literally or figuratively):--heal, preserve, save (self), do well, be (make) whole.

G4983.kjv: the body (as a sound whole), used in a very wide application, literally or figuratively:--bodily, body, slave.

G5222.kjv: an encounter or concurrence (with εἰς for infinitive, in order to fall in with):--meeting.

G5223.kjv: existency or proprietorship, i.e. (concretely) property, wealth:--goods, substance.

G5225.definition: from ὑπό and ἄρχομαι; to begin under (quietly), i.e. come into existence (be present or at hand).
G5225.kjv: expletively, to exist (as copula or subordinate to an adjective, participle, adverb or preposition, or as an auxiliary to a principal (verb):--after, behave, live.

G5227.kjv: under (covertly) contrary to, i.e. opposed or (as noun) an opponent:--adversary, against.

G5228.definition: a primary preposition; "over", i.e. (with the genitive case) of place, above, beyond, across, or causal, for the sake of, instead, regarding.
